characters.name: Alex
characters.description: Alex is a minor character that appeared in the episodeIce Pop-Pop. He is considered a cute hot guy who goes toNorth Falls High Schooland he has a twin brother. It is revealed in the episode that he is a new student in the school. At the end of the episode he and his twin brother reveal that Marvin Marvin is not an alien at all — the twins are from Fangio and have beamed through simply to expose his lies. Alex has some things in common to Brianna and seems to like her. When Brianna and Teri thought that Alex asked both of them out, it turns out that Alex has a twin brother who has some things in common with Teri and he seems to like her. He is shown to be nice and sensitive. Alex has some things in common to Brianna and seems to like her. When Brianna and Teri thought that Alex asked both of them out, it turns out that Alex has a twin brother who has some things in common with Teri and he seems to like her. He is shown to be nice and sensitive.

characters.name: Ben
characters.description: Benjaminis a student and the best (and only) friend of Marvin. He appears inPilot.  Ben is considered a shy and nerdy student.

characters.name: Bob Forman
characters.description: Father of the Forman clan unknown occupation Robert Baxter "Bob" Forman(born 1970) is father ofTeriandHenry Formanand the husband  ofLiz Forman. Not much is known about Bob, for it is very early in the series, yet what we do know is the information shown about him in the show. Bob is shown to be busy, for he had very little time to talk toMarvinin the pilot (but also due to having to "speak to Marvin's hearing organs"). Bob Forman's first appearance in the pilot showed him wearing a gray tuxedo shirt with his sleeves rolled up. He wore a light black tie over it and black dress pants. It is not shown if he was wearing dress shoe and the color of them, yet it is very possible. Bob is very ambitious, for he makes sure in the pilot that his cuff-lings were aligned and his briefcase was packed. Bob is shown to influence Henry, however, for he disregarded his wife, Liz, and took Marvin to the movies instead of the library, which similar to what Henry reenacts. He is also shown to influence Henry due to the fact that he thought that Marvin being a fight being "cool".

characters.name: Brian Oceanbottom
characters.description: Brian Oceanbottomis a confirmed character to be on Marvin's First Kiss. Brinna's little brother will hang out with Henry but Henry tries to ditch him because he is annoying.

characters.name: Brianna
characters.description: BriannaisTeri Forman's best friend. In the episodeToothache, it is shown that she doesn't really care much for biology and would much rather sleep. She is on the cheerleading team. She is portrayed byCamille Spirlin. She works atBurger on a Bun. She is shown to be on the cheer squad. She knows that Marvin is an alien and vows to keep it a secret. She is a vegan. She is generally kind and sweet, but can stand up for herself at times.

characters.name: Derek Winfeld
characters.description: Derek Winfeldis a student atNorth Falls High SchoolHe has made 2 appearances so far. Student Derek is known for acting like a horse since he actually thinks he is one. He thinks he's a horse and when Teri and Brianna mentioned him during her speech, he acted completely like a horse. So basically his personality is like a horse's personality. He can talk like a human and is good at poetry and movie reviews, as revealed inMarvin & The Cool Kids.

characters.name: Henry Forman
characters.description: Student Henry Forman(born 2000) is the son ofBob FormanandLiz Forman. He is shown to have many friends, including Marvin. He has an older teenage sister namedTeri Forman. Henry has an innie belly button. He wears briefs. Henry receives an alien wedgie from Marvin. Henry's first appearance in the pilot showed him wearing a black cloth hat with a skull printed on the side. He is wearing a gold shirt and wearing a dark jacket with plaid designs on them. He is wearing dark jeans and tennis shoes. He has tan skin like his older teenage sibling,Teri Forman, and his father,Bob Forman, and mother, Liz. Henry is shown to speak a little American slang, as he quotes "how you doin', my man?". This also shows that Marvin has been practicing his American slang for that very question. He is shown to have knowledge of ways of preventing being caught by his parents while disregarding what they say, showing he might have experience with these problems. He is shown to be very sneaky, for he can be sly by being able to lie to his parents and sneak Marvin out of the house.

characters.name: Improbable Story (Character)
characters.description: Improbable Storyis a horse that appeared in the episodeImprobable Story. He is/was a racing horse that took Marvin's advice to run away from the race. He then came to Marvin's house to get away from his owner, who repeatly calls him stupid and doesn't pet him after he won a race.  Improbable Story: He became Marvin's friend and helped Marvin bring dad's MP3 player to Teri.

characters.name: Klootonian
characters.description: Klootonians are Marvin's alien species. A Klootonian has four eyeballs with two on it's antennae, five stomachs, three hearts, and three butts. Their hearing organs are located in the butt. They have blue skin and are very weak. Marvin was seen wearing a backpack so those have been invented by Klootonians. St. Glar Kai was maybe the only Klootonian who has it's own holiday,St. Glar Kai Daywhich it the Christmas version of Klootians. They greet eachother by slapping each other on the face. They sleep in pods as shown inPilot. Their kidney looks like a liver. Their liver look like kidney. One of the stomachs are used for mating calls. The stomachs also have the ability to produce gaseous bubbles which allow them to levitate nearly freely. They can only come down by allowing the gas through his mouth, or burping. They can regurgitate substances ingested easily. They cannot pick up low sounds such as whispering. They also shown to be able to change the temperature of their finger from extremely hot to freezing cold. They can communicate with animals. They drink with one nostril and regurgitate it out with the other nostril. It's revealed inToothachethat when they develop a toothache, you must pick the nerves out in a certain order, or else it would explode in half an hour. It explodes into fireworks. They also come with an alien parenting guide attched to their foot, revealed in Pilot.

characters.name: Mr. Buttsniffer
characters.description: Mr. Buttsniffer(pronounced Boo-snifer) is the manager of Burger on a Bun. He made a one-time appearance in the namesake episode,Burger on a Bun. When he hired Marvin, he said twice Marvin needs to get diagnosed because of his weirdness. He eventually made Marvin assistant manager, but then Marvin quit when he fired Teri and Brianna when he was taking the job too seriously and realized family is more important than work. Mr. Buttsniffer taught Marvin a lesson about how teamwork is important in restaurants, and that he didn't need to take his work so seriously.

characters.name: Teri Forman
characters.description: Bob Forman(father) Henry Forman(brother) Teri is one of the smartest characters and she is also a good child. She sometimes gets concerned when Marvin is by her side since she doesn't like to get embarrassed. In Pilot, at the end, she helps save Marvin from being bullied from Cliff and Marvin helps her win the election. She also, in the beginning of Marvin's party, rejected it, but, later, she seems to be enjoying it a lot. she likes hot vampires and werewolfs.
